Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePacksFallbackReferenceManaged_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Manages texture packs more efficiently, providing a fallback option.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Ensures players have a smoother experience when loading textures, reducing errors.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePriorityBasedOnDistance_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Adjusts the loading priority of textures based on how far away they are from the player.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Optimizes game performance and visuals by loading closer textures first, making the game look better.
